dependencies.name: requests
dependencies.mediation: Pinned by Mend from constraints.txt (requests==2.31.0). pyproject.toml lists `requests` without a version, so the constraint determines the resolved version.

summary.constraint_applied: requests==2.31.0 via constraints.txt (DIRECT dep, not transitive)
summary.notes: Most constraints.txt probes test the transitive-pinning path; this one tests that direct deps are also subject to constraint enforcement. pyproject.toml deliberately declares `requests` without a version so the constraint is the deciding pin.
